data.name: Can I get an Iced Coffee with Breastmilk!?
data.detailed_description:
Throughout history, from the moment that man could walk on two feet, we have asked ourselves: “What if?”. What if we cooked meat over a fire, added some spices, and turned raw steak into a steak tartar? What if we planted seeds into the ground, and turned them into rice?

What if we put breast milk in our coffee?

Well, it’s finally happened! Wonder “What if?” no more, as we bring the breast milk to you in all it’s 3D goodness!

CHOOSE YOUR DRINK!

Choose from over seven delicious drinks that’ll be prepared, just for you, with love and care!

HELP HER OUT!

Even the best baristas need help from time to time! Help Muffin craft the most delectable treats, and enjoy multiple different drink-specific sex poses that’ll have you going “Huh, yeah. That would go with that kind of drink”. But watch out! No good deed goes unrewarded! As through the magic and wonders of calcium, Muffin’s tits expand with each day that you help her out!

FILL HER LUST!

Because every Barista has a favorite customer! With every day that you help her, Muffin’s lust will grow until the final day!

OR MAYBE TRY SOMETHING ELSE?

Not feeling like breast milk with your coffee today? That’s okay! There’s a different ending for every choice! Watch all optional endings play out in their hilarious fashion!

Features & Gameplay

  • Play as Lucas, a regular Coffee Addict who gets to live out his wildest dreams with the local Coffee Shop`s Barista Muffin!

  • Play in First Person and get up close and personal with Muffin in this 3D dating sim!

  • Play through a week of visiting your favorite coffee shop and discover unique endings and experiences for every day!

  • Straight to the Point: A short and engaging story, full of whacky and wholesome moments.

  • Both Characters are fully and uniquely voiced by our seasoned anime and hentai voice actors for extra high quality & orgasmic sex dialogue and sounds!

  • Enjoy our unique and one hand ready interactive sex system or let things slide through auto-play.

  • Feel every stroke and thrust with your Lovense Toy, ensuring that you experience hentai the way it was meant to be!

  • 3 Different Skin Variants for Muffin: OG ANBW Bunny, Barista Bunny or Human Bunny

  • Expansive Sandbox Mode that offers a wide range of choices from quickplay to full animation toolkit!

  • Characters can be individually muted!

  • Wide Range of Audio Customization to allow for full customization of the Audio-Experience at any moment of the game!

data.short_description: Visit your favorite Bunny Girl, Muffin, and get the Ultimate Breast Milk treatment for your daily Coffee intake in this first person hentai short story! Make tits expand, make milk flow!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit
  • 處理器: intel i5 8400 | AMD Ryzen 5 2600
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 4GBs VRAM | NVIDIA GTX-1060 | AMD Radeon RX 590
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: If you experience low fps simply decrease any graphics setting related to render resolution to start gaining frames back.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 64bit
  • 處理器: intel i7 8700 | AMD Ryzen 5 3600
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 8GBs VRAM | NVIDIA RTX-2080 | AMD Radeon RX 6700
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: If you experience low fps simply decrease any graphics setting related to render resolution to start gaining frames back.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 64bit
  • Processor: intel i5 8400 | AMD Ryzen 5 2600
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 4GBs VRAM | NVIDIA GTX-1060 | AMD Radeon RX 590
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: If you experience low fps simply decrease any graphics setting related to render resolution to start gaining frames back.
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 11 64bit
  • Processor: intel i7 8700 | AMD Ryzen 5 3600
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 8GBs VRAM | NVIDIA RTX-2080 | AMD Radeon RX 6700
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: If you experience low fps simply decrease any graphics setting related to render resolution to start gaining frames back.
